arts.ttl: Who is Jack Porter? 16-year-old Arsenal goalkeeper set to start Carabao Cup tie
arts.sum: The 16-year-old could be handed a shock debut as a result of Arsenal’s injury crisis

arts.ttl: Arsenal team news: 16-year-old in goal as Raheem Sterling makes full debut
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta makes sweeping changes for Wednesday's EFL Cup third-round tie with Bolton Wanderers, where four teenagers will make their full debuts.

arts.ttl: Martin Odegaard offers update on 'significant' Arsenal injury and makes 'scared' admission
arts.sum: Arsenal captain Martin Odegaard suffered an ankle injury while away on international duty with Norway and the midfielder has provided a fresh update on his recovery

arts.ttl: Wojciech Szczesny 'agrees to join Barcelona' as the former Arsenal goalkeeper 'comes out of retirement' to cover for injured Marc-Andre ter Stegen
arts.sum: Polish shot-stopper Wojciech Szczesny is set to join Barcelona as an emergency replacement goalkeeper after coming to an agreement with the European giants, according to reports.

arts.ttl: Norway manager reveals 'plan' for Martin Odegaard to make injury return quicker than expected
arts.sum: Norway manager Stale Solbakken is still hopeful that he may be able to select Martin Odegaard for the October international break, despite the Arsenal captain nursing ankle ligament damage. Club boss Mikel Arteta admitted last week that the midfielder looks set to be out "for a while" and doubted he would be avaialble for Norway's October fixtures.

arts.ttl: 'If we're totally honest right now': Ian Wright says there's something about Arsenal that's worrying him
arts.sum: Arsenal have managed to successfully navigate three difficult away trips in a row following the international break. The Gunners were up against arch-rivals Tottenham Hotspur,...

arts.ttl: Arsenal have clear Chelsea and Man City blueprint to boost title push
arts.sum: Whilst winning the League Cup won't be what this season is judged on for Arteta, it could provide a solid foundation towards lifting a first league title since 2004. It is going to be an interesting summer at the Emirates Stadium as Arsenal look to make changes and give Mikel Arteta the squad to overhaul Manchester City and win the Premier League title.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'considering' reigniting their interest in £54m-rated striker
arts.sum: Arsenal could allegedly reignite their interest in Juventus centre-forward Dusan Vlahovic next summer.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: £66m striker is still wanted by Arsenal but he's never been keen on England move before
Report: Manchester United want to sign £96.3m striker who is 'better' than Haaland but Arsenal are favourites
